name: explicit local lane
prompt: Run the local split CU DU OCUDU lane for 60 seconds with no-core and test-mode.

name: software only split lane
prompt: Start srscucp, srscuup, and srsdu on one host without the core as a local OCUDU checkpoint.

name: local runtime dry run
prompt: Show me the local runtime container command before executing the split-lane test.

name: reuse installed tree
prompt: Use the existing .local/ocudu install tree to run the software-only local runtime stage.

name: negative project build
prompt: Clone and build srsRAN Project release_25_10 first.

name: negative open5gs core
prompt: Start the pinned Open5GS core stack and check health.

name: negative zmq e2e
prompt: Run the full gNB plus Open5GS plus srsUE ZMQ proof-of-concept path.

name: negative skill qa
prompt: Run the QA gate against a new or updated tracked skill.
